translation.en: I like to swim in the summer.

notes_md:
**bơi** = to swim, to move through water using your body. It’s the basic verb for swimming in any situation.

Use it with places: *bơi ở hồ bơi*, *bơi dưới sông*, *bơi ngoài biển*. You can also combine it with direction words like *bơi qua* (swim across) or *bơi ra/vào* (swim out/in).


Related word: **lội** = wade (walk in shallow water) — not the same as actually swimming.
exampleSentencesTranslated: I like to go to the beach to swim every weekend.
I learned how to swim when I was young with my older sister.
Friends often invite each other to go swim at the pool near home.

translation.en: I like to swim at the beach.

exampleSentences: Anh thích đi ra biển để bơi vào mỗi cuối tuần.
Em đã học cách bơi khi còn nhỏ với chị gái.
Bạn bè thường rủ nhau đi bơi ở hồ bơi gần nhà.

example.vi: Tôi thích bơi trong hồ bơi.
example.es: Me gusta nadar en la piscina.
example.en: I like to swim in the swimming pool.

definitions.en: To move through water by using the arms and legs.
definitions.es: Moverse a través del agua usando los brazos y las piernas.
definitions.vi: Di chuyển trong nước bằng cách sử dụng tay và chân.

notes:
bơi = to swim, to move through water using your body. It’s the basic verb for swimming in any situation.

Use it with places: bơi ở hồ bơi, bơi dưới sông, bơi ngoài biển. You can also combine it with direction words like bơi qua (swim across) or bơi ra/vào (swim out/in).

Related word: lội = wade (walk in shallow water) — not the same as actually swimming.
